dtsPropsFor.DepthLadder:
/** contract code, e.g. "TMFR1" — the 5-level book is read from the live quote store */
  code: string;
dtsPropsFor.PnlPanel: /** This component takes no props — it polls and charts realized P&L for the signed-in account. */
dtsPropsFor.DepthMap:
/** the contract whose 5-level book heatmap is recorded over time */
  contract: { code: string };
dtsPropsFor.SectorHeatmap:
/** called when a sector tile or member stock is picked */
  onPick?: (code: string) => void;
